name: Zara
alt_names: ミス・ダブルフィンガー
description:
__Height:__ 187 cm (6'2")
__Affiliations:__ Baroque Works
__Devil Fruit:__ Toge Toge no Mi (Spike Spike Fruit)
__Devil Fruit Type:__ Paramecia
__Bounty:__ ~!35,000,000!~

Zara, better known by her alias Miss Doublefinger, is the second highest ranking female officer agent in the secret organization known as Baroque Works. As an officer agent, she is partnered with Mr. 1. She also used the alias of Paula while she acted as the owner of Spiders Cafe in Arabasta.
